### get_logger

>  get_logger (name:str='mcp.nbdev')

*Get an existing logger by name without reconfiguring.*

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>name</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>mcp.nbdev</td>

</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>

</tr>

### setup_logging

>  setup_logging (level:str|int|None=None, fmt:str|None=None,
>                     name:str='mcp.nbdev', stream:typing.TextIO|None=None,
>                     force:bool=False)

*Configure and return the shared nbdev-mcp logger.*

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>level</td>
<td>str | int | None</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Log level (e.g., <code>'DEBUG'</code>, <code>'INFO'</code>,
<code>logging.WARNING</code>).<br>Defaults to
<code>NBMCP_LOG_LEVEL</code> env var or <code>'INFO'</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>fmt</td>
<td>str | None</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Log format string. Defaults to
:data:<code>DEFAULT_LOG_FORMAT</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>name</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>mcp.nbdev</td>
<td>Logger name. Defaults to <code>'mcp.nbdev'</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>stream</td>
<td>typing.TextIO | None</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Output stream for the handler (e.g.,
<code>sys.stderr</code>).<br>Defaults to <code>sys.stderr</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>force</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>False</td>
<td>If True, remove existing handlers before configuring.<br>Useful for
reconfiguring in notebooks.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Logger</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Configured logger instance.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
